business.name: Scoops Ice Cream
business.tagline: Hand-dipped ice cream, milkshakes, and more in the foothills of North Carolina.

hours.note: Seasonal hours, typically open spring through fall
hours.typical: 12pm - 9pm daily (may vary by location and season)

business.ownerNote: Husband-wife team, local to Rutherford County

voice.tone: friendly, family-oriented, small-town cheerful, seasonal, fun

brand.colorDirection: Bright, cheerful, ice cream parlor vibes. Pastel pinks, blues, mint greens, creamy whites. Fun and inviting.
brand.mood: Happy, nostalgic, family-friendly. Think classic American ice cream parlor updated for a small-town Main Street. Summer vibes year-round.

content.heroSubtext: Ice cream, milkshakes, sundaes, and smiles on Broadway Street in Forest City. Four locations across the NC foothills.
sellingPoints: 4 locations across the NC foothills (Forest City, Lake Lure, Rutherfordton, Marion)
Hand-dipped ice cream with rotating flavors
Custom ice cream cakes for events
Active Instagram with 437+ posts showing daily flavors
Lake Lure location serves the tourist/vacation crowd
Downtown Forest City location on Broadway Street
Seasonal specials and new flavors regularly

assets.heroImage: Ice cream shop exterior or colorful scoop shots from Instagram
assets.galleryImages: Instagram has 437 posts with excellent product photography
needed: Product shots from Instagram (ice cream scoops, shakes, sundaes, cakes)

meta.currentWebPresence: No dedicated website. Facebook and Instagram are primary online presence. Google Business listing.

ratings.facebook: Active page with regular flavor posts

blockers: Need storefront photos (at least Forest City location)
Need product photos (can source from Instagram with permission)
